arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [1]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (1)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 1)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 1)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [1]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [2]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (2)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 2)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 2)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [2]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [3]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (3)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 3)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 3)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [3]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [4]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (4)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 4)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 4)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [4]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [5]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (5)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [5]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [6]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (6)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [6]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [7]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (7)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [7]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [8]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (8)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [8]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [9]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (9)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [9]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [10]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (10)

wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [10]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [11]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (11)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 11)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [11]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [12]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (12)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 12)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 12)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [12]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [13]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (13)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 13)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 13)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [13]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [14]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (14)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 14)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 14)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [14]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [15]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (15)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 15)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 15)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [15]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [16]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (16)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 16)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 16)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [16]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [17]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (17)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 17)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 17)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [17]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [18]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (18)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 18)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 18)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [18]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [19]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (19)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 19)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 19)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [19]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [20]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (20)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 20)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 20)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [20]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [21]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (21)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 21)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 21)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [21]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [22]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (22)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 22)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 22)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [22]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [23]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (23)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 23)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 23)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [23]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [24]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (24)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 24)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [24]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [25]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (25)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [25]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [26]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (26)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [26]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [27]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (27)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [27]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [28]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (28)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [28]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [29]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (29)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [29]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [30]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (30)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [30]

arabicText: نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [31]
latinTransliteration: Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (31)
englishTranslation: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [31]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [32]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (32)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [32]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [33]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (33)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [33]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [34]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (34)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [34]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [35]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (35)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [35]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [36]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (36)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [36]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [37]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (37)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [37]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [38]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (38)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [38]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [39]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (39)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [39]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [40]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (40)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [40]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [41]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (41)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 41)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 41)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [41]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [42]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (42)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 42)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 42)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [42]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [43]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (43)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 43)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 43)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [43]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [44]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (44)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 44)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 44)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [44]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [45]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (45)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 45)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 45)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [45]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [46]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (46)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 46)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 46)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [46]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [47]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (47)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 47)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 47)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [47]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [48]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (48)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [48]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [49]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (49)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [49]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [50]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (50)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [50]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [51]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (51)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 51)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 51)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [51]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [52]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (52)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [52]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [53]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (53)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [53]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [54]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (54)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [54]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [55]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (55)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [55]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [56]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (56)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [56]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [57]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (57)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 57)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 57)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [57]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [58]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (58)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 58)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 58)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [58]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [59]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (59)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 59)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 59)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [59]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [60]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (60)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 60)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 60)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [60]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [61]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (61)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 61)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 61)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [61]

arabicText: وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [62]
latinTransliteration: Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (62)
englishTranslation: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 62)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 62)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [62]

arabicText: شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [63]
latinTransliteration: Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (63)
englishTranslation: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 63)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 63)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [63]

arabicText: شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [64]
latinTransliteration: Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (64)
englishTranslation: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 64)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 64)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [64]

arabicText: شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [65]
latinTransliteration: Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (65)
englishTranslation: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 65)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 65)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [65]

arabicText: شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [66]
latinTransliteration: Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (66)
englishTranslation: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 66)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 66)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [66]

arabicText: شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [67]
latinTransliteration: Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (67)
