(Stanza 121)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra', Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 121)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [121]

arabicText: بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [122]
latinTransliteration: Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra', Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (122)
englishTranslation: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra': And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 122)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra', Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 122)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [122]

arabicText: بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [123]
latinTransliteration: Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra', Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (123)
englishTranslation: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra': And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 123)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra', Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 123)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [123]

arabicText: بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [124]
latinTransliteration: Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra', Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (124)
englishTranslation: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra': So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 124)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Prophethood & Cave Hira] Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra', Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 124)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [124]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [125]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (125)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 125)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 125)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [125]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [126]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (126)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 126)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 126)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [126]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [127]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (127)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 127)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 127)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [127]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [128]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (128)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 128)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 128)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [128]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [129]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (129)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 129)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 129)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [129]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [130]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (130)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 130)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 130)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [130]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [131]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (131)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 131)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 131)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [131]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [132]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (132)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 132)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 132)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [132]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [133]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (133)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 133)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 133)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [133]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [134]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (134)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 134)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 134)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [134]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [135]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (135)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 135)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 135)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [135]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [136]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (136)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 136)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 136)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [136]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [137]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (137)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 137)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 137)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [137]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [138]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (138)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 138)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 138)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [138]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [139]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (139)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 139)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 139)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [139]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [140]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (140)

wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [140]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [141]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (141)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 141)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 141)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [141]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [142]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (142)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 142)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 142)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [142]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [143]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (143)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 143)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 143)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [143]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [144]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (144)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 144)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 144)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [144]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [145]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (145)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 145)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 145)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [145]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [146]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (146)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 146)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 146)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [146]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [147]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (147)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 147)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 147)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [147]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [148]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (148)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 148)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 148)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [148]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [149]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (149)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 149)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 149)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [149]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [150]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (150)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 150)

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [151]

(Stanza 151)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 151)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [151]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [152]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (152)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 152)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 152)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [152]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [153]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (153)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 153)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 153)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [153]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [154]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (154)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 154)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 154)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [154]

arabicText: صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [155]
latinTransliteration: Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (155)
englishTranslation: [Patience Under Persecution] The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 155)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Patience Under Persecution] Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 155)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [155]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [156]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (156)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 156)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 156)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [156]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [157]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (157)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 157)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 157)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [157]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [158]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (158)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 158)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 158)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [158]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [159]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (159)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 159)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 159)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [159]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [160]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (160)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 160)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 160)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [160]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [161]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (161)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 161)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 161)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [161]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [162]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (162)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 162)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 162)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [162]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [163]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (163)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 163)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 163)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [163]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [164]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (164)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 164)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 164)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [164]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [165]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (165)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 165)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 165)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [165]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [166]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (166)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 166)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 166)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [166]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [167]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (167)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 167)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 167)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [167]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [168]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (168)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 168)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 168)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [168]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [169]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (169)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 169)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 169)
wolofalAjamiScript: اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [169]

arabicText: الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [170]
latinTransliteration: Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (170)
englishTranslation: [Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 170)
