wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 260)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [260]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [261]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (261)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 261)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 261)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [261]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [262]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (262)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 262)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 262)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [262]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [263]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (263)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 263)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 263)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [263]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [264]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (264)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 264)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 264)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [264]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [265]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (265)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 265)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 265)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [265]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [266]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (266)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 266)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 266)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [266]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [267]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (267)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 267)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 267)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [267]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [268]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (268)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 268)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 268)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [268]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [269]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (269)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 269)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 269)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [269]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [270]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (270)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 270)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 270)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [270]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [271]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (271)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 271)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 271)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [271]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [272]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (272)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 272)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 272)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [272]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [273]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (273)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 273)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 273)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [273]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [274]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (274)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 274)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 274)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [274]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [275]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (275)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 275)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 275)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [275]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [276]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (276)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 276)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 276)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [276]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، قَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [277]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (277)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: There has come in the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 277)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 277)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [277]

arabicText: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [278]
latinTransliteration: Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm, Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (278)
englishTranslation: [Farewell & Sublime Character] The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger: And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 278)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Farewell & Sublime Character] Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi, Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 278)
wolofalAjamiScript: حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ، تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [278]
